VERSION 3.27.0.91

AFFECT /qml/device/view/navigator/Navigator.qml
    TRAVERSE FocusScope
        LOCATE BEFORE Loader#searchLoader
        INSERT {
            property alias sudokuPageView: _sudokuPageView
            property string remarkableSudokuDocumentId: "__SUDOKU_DOCUMENT_ID__"
            property bool remarkableSudokuAwaitingDocument: false
            property int remarkableSudokuActivationAttempts: 0

            function activateRemarkableSudokuDocument() {
                if (!_sudokuPageView.item
                    || typeof _sudokuPageView.item.tryActivateLiveDocumentSudoku !== "function") {
                    return false;
                }

                const activated = _sudokuPageView.item.tryActivateLiveDocumentSudoku(
                    root.remarkableSudokuDocumentId);

                if (!activated) {
                    return false;
                }

                root.remarkableSudokuAwaitingDocument = false;
                root.remarkableSudokuActivationAttempts = 0;
                remarkableSudokuActivationProbe.stop();
                _sudokuPageView.visible = false;
                return true;
            }

            function startRemarkableSudokuActivation() {
                root.remarkableSudokuAwaitingDocument = true;
                root.remarkableSudokuActivationAttempts = 0;
                remarkableSudokuActivationProbe.restart();
            }

            function openRemarkableSudokuDocument() {
                try {
                    if (documentView && documentView.item
                        && typeof documentView.item.openDocument === "function") {
                        documentView.item.openDocument(root.remarkableSudokuDocumentId);
                        return true;
                    }
                } catch (error) {
                    console.log("[RemarkableSudokuXovi] documentView.item.openDocument failed", error);
                }

                try {
                    if (typeof root.openDocument === "function") {
                        root.openDocument(root.remarkableSudokuDocumentId);
                        return true;
                    }
                } catch (error) {
                    console.log("[RemarkableSudokuXovi] root.openDocument failed", error);
                }

                console.log(
                    "[RemarkableSudokuXovi] No document opener accepted Sudoku document",
                    root.remarkableSudokuDocumentId);
                return false;
            }

            function hasRemarkableSudokuDocumentOpen() {
                return !!documentView
                    && documentView.visible
                    && documentView.document
                    && documentView.document.id === root.remarkableSudokuDocumentId;
            }
        }

        LOCATE AFTER Loader#searchLoader
        INSERT {
            Loader {
                id: _sudokuPageView
                anchors.fill: parent
                z: 1000
                visible: false
                active: true
                source: "qrc:/remarkable-sudoku/qml/SudokuPageHost.qml"
            }

            Connections {
                target: _sudokuPageView.item

                function onRequestClose() {
                    _sudokuPageView.visible = false;
                }
            }

            Connections {
                target: documentView.item
                ignoreUnknownSignals: true

                function onDocumentLoaded() {
                    const loadedDocument = documentView.document
                    const loadedDocumentId = loadedDocument && loadedDocument.id
                        ? loadedDocument.id
                        : ""

                    console.log(
                        "[RemarkableSudokuXovi] documentLoaded",
                        loadedDocumentId,
                        "awaiting=",
                        root.remarkableSudokuAwaitingDocument)

                    if (loadedDocumentId !== root.remarkableSudokuDocumentId) {
                        return;
                    }

                    root.activateRemarkableSudokuDocument();

                    if (root.remarkableSudokuAwaitingDocument) {
                        root.startRemarkableSudokuActivation();
                    }
                }
            }

            Timer {
                id: remarkableSudokuActivationProbe
                interval: 150
                repeat: true
                running: false

                onTriggered: {
                    root.remarkableSudokuActivationAttempts += 1;

                    if (root.activateRemarkableSudokuDocument()) {
                        return;
                    }

                    if (!root.remarkableSudokuAwaitingDocument) {
                        stop();
                        return;
                    }

                    if (root.remarkableSudokuActivationAttempts >= 80) {
                        root.remarkableSudokuAwaitingDocument = false;
                        console.log(
                            "[RemarkableSudokuXovi] Sudoku activation probe timed out",
                            root.remarkableSudokuDocumentId);
                        stop();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT /qml/device/view/documentview/DocumentView.qml
    TRAVERSE ?#root
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            property string remarkableSudokuDocumentId: "__SUDOKU_DOCUMENT_ID__"
            readonly property bool remarkableSudokuDocumentMatches: !!root.document
                && root.document.id === root.remarkableSudokuDocumentId
            property bool remarkableSudokuActive: root.remarkableSudokuDocumentMatches
            property bool remarkableSudokuBoardInteractionEnabled: true
            property string remarkableSudokuPanel: "sudoku"

            onRemarkableSudokuDocumentMatchesChanged: {
                if (root.remarkableSudokuDocumentMatches) {
                    root.remarkableSudokuBoardInteractionEnabled = true;
                }
            }
        }

        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            Loader {
                id: remarkableSudokuDocumentPage
                anchors.fill: parent
                z: 200000
                active: root.remarkableSudokuDocumentMatches
                    && root.remarkableSudokuActive
                    && root.remarkableSudokuPanel === "sudoku"
                visible: active && root.remarkableSudokuBoardInteractionEnabled
                enabled: visible
                source: "qrc:/remarkable-sudoku/qml/SudokuAppView.qml"

                onLoaded: {
                    if (!item) {
                        return;
                    }

                    item.backgroundColor = "transparent";
                    item.documentOverlayMode = true;
                    item.boardInteractionEnabled = root.remarkableSudokuBoardInteractionEnabled;
                    item.sceneRoot = root;
                }
            }

            Connections {
                target: remarkableSudokuDocumentPage.item
                ignoreUnknownSignals: true

                function onBoardInteractionEnabledChanged() {
                    root.remarkableSudokuBoardInteractionEnabled =
                        !!remarkableSudokuDocumentPage.item.boardInteractionEnabled;
                }

                function onRequestClose() {
                    root.remarkableSudokuPanel = "sudoku";
                    root.remarkableSudokuBoardInteractionEnabled = true;

                    try {
                        root.close();
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.log("[RemarkableSudokuXovi] DocumentView close failed", error);
                    }
                }

                function onRequestInkDebug() {
                    root.remarkableSudokuPanel = "ink-debug";
                }
            }

            Rectangle {
                id: remarkableSudokuDocumentModeButton
                anchors.top: parent.top
                anchors.right: parent.right
                anchors.topMargin: 18
                anchors.rightMargin: 18
                z: 200002
                visible: root.remarkableSudokuDocumentMatches
                    && root.remarkableSudokuActive
                    && root.remarkableSudokuPanel === "sudoku"
                    && !root.remarkableSudokuBoardInteractionEnabled
                width: Math.max(88, remarkableSudokuDocumentModeLabel.implicitWidth + 34)
                height: 42
                radius: 21
                color: "#111111"
                border.color: "#111111"
                border.width: 1

                Text {
                    id: remarkableSudokuDocumentModeLabel
                    anchors.centerIn: parent
                    color: "#fcfbf8"
                    font.bold: true
                    font.pixelSize: 18
                    text: qsTr("Board")
                }

                TapHandler {
                    acceptedButtons: Qt.LeftButton

                    onTapped: {
                        root.remarkableSudokuBoardInteractionEnabled = true;

                        if (remarkableSudokuDocumentPage.item) {
                            remarkableSudokuDocumentPage.item.boardInteractionEnabled = true;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            Loader {
                id: remarkableSudokuInkDebugPage
                anchors.fill: parent
                z: 200001
                active: root.remarkableSudokuDocumentMatches
                    && root.remarkableSudokuActive
                    && root.remarkableSudokuPanel === "ink-debug"
                visible: active
                source: "qrc:/remarkable-sudoku/qml/InkDebugAppView.qml"
            }

            Connections {
                target: remarkableSudokuInkDebugPage.item
                ignoreUnknownSignals: true

                function onRequestClose() {
                    root.remarkableSudokuPanel = "sudoku";
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT /qml/device/view/documentview/DeviceSceneView.qml
    TRAVERSE ?#root[!viewport]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            Rectangle {
                id: remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator
                objectName: "RemarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator"
                z: 200001
                width: sceneIndicatorLabel.implicitWidth + 34
                height: 30
                radius: height / 2
                color: "#d9e6f5"
                border.color: "#1d3859"
                border.width: 1
                opacity: 0.82
                anchors.top: parent.top
                anchors.left: parent.left
                anchors.topMargin: 20
                anchors.leftMargin: 20
                property int probeAttempt: 0
                property int strokeCount: 0
                property int gestureCount: 0
                property var strokeHandlerTarget: null
                property bool sceneReady: false

                function hasViewport() {
                    return !!root.viewport;
                }

                function hasTileManager() {
                    return !!root.tileManager;
                }

                function updateIndicator() {
                    const hasStrokeHandler = !!remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.strokeHandlerTarget;

                    sceneIndicatorLabel.text =
                        "RS V" + (remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.hasViewport() ? 1 : 0)
                        + " T" + (remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.hasTileManager() ? 1 : 0)
                        + " S" + (hasStrokeHandler ? 1 : 0)
                        + " #" + remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.strokeCount;

                    if (remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.hasViewport()
                        || remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.hasTileManager()) {
                        remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.color = "#d8ecd1";
                        remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.border.color = "#294d25";
                    } else {
                        remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.color = "#d9e6f5";
                        remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.border.color = "#1d3859";
                    }
                }

                function refreshTargets() {
                    if (root.viewport) {
                        root.viewport.objectName = "RemarkableSudokuViewport";
                    }

                    if (root.tileManager) {
                        root.tileManager.objectName = "RemarkableSudokuSceneTileManager";
                    }

                    if (typeof strokeHandler !== "undefined" && strokeHandler) {
                        strokeHandler.objectName = "RemarkableSudokuStrokeHandler";
                        remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.strokeHandlerTarget = strokeHandler;
                    }

                    remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.updateIndicator();
                }

                function captureState(label) {
                    remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.refreshTargets();

                    console.log(
                        "[RemarkableSudokuXovi] DeviceSceneView",
                        label,
                        "attempt=",
                        remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.probeAttempt,
                        "pageId=",
                        root.pageId,
                        "viewport=",
                        root.viewport,
                        "tileManager=",
                        root.tileManager,
                        "strokeHandler=",
                        remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.strokeHandlerTarget,
                        "notePage=",
                        root.notePage,
                        "strokes=",
                        remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.strokeCount,
                        "gestures=",
                        remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.gestureCount
                    );
                }

                Row {
                    anchors.centerIn: parent
                    spacing: 8

                    Rectangle {
                        width: 10
                        height: 10
                        radius: width / 2
                        color: "#1d3859"
                    }

                    Text {
                        id: sceneIndicatorLabel
                        text: "RS V0 T0 S0 #0"
                        color: "#0f1c2b"
                        font.pixelSize: 15
                    }
                }

                Component.onCompleted: {
                    root.objectName = "RemarkableSudokuPatchedDeviceSceneView";
                    remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.captureState("patch active");
                }

                Connections {
                    target: remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.strokeHandlerTarget
                    ignoreUnknownSignals: true

                    function onStrokeCompleted(line) {
                        remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.strokeCount += 1;
                        remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.updateIndicator();

                        if (remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.strokeCount <= 4
                            || remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.strokeCount % 5 === 0) {
                            remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.captureState("strokeCompleted");
                        }
                    }

                    function onGestureStarted(kind, payload) {
                        remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.gestureCount += 1;
                        remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.captureState("gestureStarted");
                    }
                }

                Timer {
                    interval: 400
                    running: true
                    repeat: true

                    onTriggered: {
                        remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.probeAttempt += 1;

                        if (remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.probeAttempt <= 4
                            || remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.probeAttempt % 5 === 0) {
                            remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.captureState("poll");
                        }

                        if (!remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.sceneReady
                            && (remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.hasViewport()
                                || remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.hasTileManager())) {
                            remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.sceneReady = true;
                            remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.captureState("ready");
                        }

                        if (remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.strokeHandlerTarget) {
                            remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.captureState("stroke-ready");
                            stop();
                            return;
                        }

                        if (remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.probeAttempt >= 40) {
                            remarkableSudokuScenePatchIndicator.captureState("timeout");
                            stop();
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT /qml/device/view/navigator/Sidebar.qml
    TRAVERSE DeviceKeyboardNavigationHandler > ColumnLayout#filterColumn
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            SidebarFilterItem {
                id: openSudoku
                objectName: "openSudoku"
                title: qsTr("Sudoku")
                iconSource: "qrc:/ark/icons/storage"
                active: navigator.hasRemarkableSudokuDocumentOpen()
                enabled: true
                Layout.preferredHeight: Values.navigatorSidebarItemHeight
                Layout.preferredWidth: parent.width
                navigationHandler: root

                onClicked: {
                    if (!navigator.activateRemarkableSudokuDocument()) {
                        navigator.startRemarkableSudokuActivation();

                        if (!navigator.hasRemarkableSudokuDocumentOpen()) {
                            navigator.openRemarkableSudokuDocument();
                        }
                    }

                    root.resetFocusIndex();
                }

                Image {
                    anchors.right: parent.right
                    anchors.rightMargin: 28
                    anchors.verticalCenter: parent.verticalCenter
                    width: 24
                    height: 24
                    fillMode: Image.PreserveAspectFit
                    source: "qrc:/ark/icons/chevron_right"
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
